fields.name: source_id
fields.description: id from sources.csv this record applies to.

fields.name: license_type
fields.description: License type or grant (e.g., Public Domain, CC-BY-4.0, Commercial License).

fields.name: granted_date
fields.description: ISO 8601 date rights were confirmed or license granted.

fields.name: expiry_date
fields.description: ISO 8601 date rights expire, or the literal string 'perpetual'.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Any relevant notes. MAY be empty.
